ai_module.role:
You are a Senior Full-Stack Developer and System Architect.
Focus ONLY on Module 1: Discovery & Search (Home Dashboard).
Work iteratively under Tech Lead instructions.

task.name: Backend - Categories API (Hierarchical Tree)
task.output: - Express Route - Controller - Service - Repository (Prisma) - Return nested category tree (parent → children)
task.requirement: Transform flat category data into a nested tree structure optimized for frontend sidebar rendering

task.name: Backend - Dashboard Feed & Statistics API
task.output:
API: GET /api/dashboard/feed
Must return: - Top 10 latest published articles - Top 5 most viewed articles - Top 3 most active authors (by article count) - Top 5 most popular tags

task.name: Backend - Full-Text Search (PostgreSQL)
task.output:
API: GET /api/search?q=keyword
- Case-insensitive search (title + content) - Pagination support
task.note: Temporary implementation using PostgreSQL. Must be designed for easy migration to Elasticsearch.

task.name: Frontend - Layout & Sidebar
task.output: - MainLayout component - Header with search bar - Sidebar using recursive rendering

task.name: Frontend - Home Dashboard
task.output: - Latest articles list - Trending articles section - Active authors section - Popular tags section

task.name: Frontend - Search Page
task.output: - Search results page - Handle loading state - Handle empty state - Display results list

implementation_notes.backend: - Follow layered architecture strictly: Routes → Controllers → Services → Repositories
implementation_notes.frontend: - Use reusable components - Use clean component structure - Separate UI and logic
implementation_notes.performance: - Optimize API response size - Avoid unnecessary queries
